title: Count All Valid Pickup and Delivery Options
hints: Consider adding orders one by one. How many valid positions exist for a new pair given existing events?
Use dynamic programming. Let dp[i] be valid sequences for i orders. Find how dp[i] relates to dp[i-1].
For the i-th order, there are 2i-1 slots before or between existing events. Choose 2 spots for P_i and D_i.
